message:
fix(cli): Add missing error handling and consistency improvements

- forget.ts: Wrap withLock in try/catch for JSON error output
- undo.ts: Wrap withLock in try/catch for JSON error output
- audit.ts: Fix mixed tabs/spaces indentation
- why.ts: Remove unused printJson import
- init.ts: Use printJsonError with proper error codes instead of printJson
- types.ts: Add ALREADY_EXISTS error code

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -709,6 +709,7 @@ export const ErrorCode = {
   FILE_PERMISSION_DENIED: "FILE_PERMISSION_DENIED",
   FILE_WRITE_FAILED: "FILE_WRITE_FAILED",
   LOCK_ACQUISITION_FAILED: "LOCK_ACQUISITION_FAILED",
+  ALREADY_EXISTS: "ALREADY_EXISTS",
 
   // Operational errors
   SANITIZATION_FAILED: "SANITIZATION_FAILED",
@@ -741,6 +742,7 @@ export const CMErrorCodeEnum = z.enum([
   "FILE_PERMISSION_DENIED",
   "FILE_WRITE_FAILED",
   "LOCK_ACQUISITION_FAILED",
+  "ALREADY_EXISTS",
   "SANITIZATION_FAILED",
   "VALIDATION_FAILED",
   "REFLECTION_FAILED",
